name: Baker, Charles Armstrong
description: "Gloomy Gus" has the "divine touch" on the piano and a perpetual smile. Never caught eavesdropping.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Gloomy Gus" has the "divine touch" on the piano and a perpetual smile. Never caught eavesdropping.

name: Barrett, Edward Phillip
motto: "The big husky guy that EATS 'EM ALIVE."
description: Believes he can bowl 310 if the pins were set right. Fluent use of elegant language.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"The big husky guy that EATS 'EM ALIVE."
Believes he can bowl 310 if the pins were set right. Fluent use of elegant language.

name: Bowles, John Hyer
description: Agitator and consumer of homespun. Dotes on framed structures.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Agitator and consumer of homespun. Dotes on framed structures.

name: Boyer, George Hewitt
description: Got lean dodging marriageable daughters. Believes overfeeding prevents baldness. Noted for his convictions.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Step and a half."
Got lean dodging marriageable daughters. Believes overfeeding prevents baldness. Noted for his convictions.

name: Dudley, Boyd Jr.
description: The Pride of Gallatin. Perseveres in attention—to himself. Asks fool questions.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"De Wise Guy."
The Pride of Gallatin. Perseveres in attention—to himself. Asks fool questions.

name: Flynt, Frank LeRoy
description: Cultivates a resemblance to Prof. Harris, ably assisted by Nature.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Papa"
Cultivates a resemblance to Prof. Harris, ably assisted by Nature.

name: Fowler, James Duncan
description: Made good in practice.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Made good in practice.

name: French, Charles Lewis
description: Goes to chapel and applauds prayers.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Goes to chapel and applauds prayers.

name: Ham, Roscoe Conkling
description: Inventor of the "Ham" system of crushing with rolls, both rolls taking in the same direction.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Inventor of the "Ham" system of crushing with rolls, both rolls taking in the same direction.

name: Harper, Frank William
description: Matrimonially inclined. Imagines he has epicurean tastes. Uses his chemical knowledge to this end. Is a living representation of the atom.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Matrimonially inclined. Imagines he has epicurean tastes. Uses his chemical knowledge to this end. Is a living representation of the atom.

name: Hase, Herman Carl
description: A future "Heine" Hoffman.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A future "Heine" Hoffman.

name: Hirsch, Van Buren
description: Noted for his caution—always on the fence. Reason: "I'm Married Now"—that's all.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Noted for his caution—always on the fence. Reason: "I'm Married Now"—that's all.

name: Dibrell, Pryor Hynes
description: One of the 57 varieties of Dill pickles. Thinks he's humorous. Will study on provocation.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Rameses II."
One of the 57 varieties of Dill pickles. Thinks he's humorous. Will study on provocation.

name: Horace, Asahel Johnson
description: His sweetheart said he MUST graduate, and he did.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: His sweetheart said he MUST graduate, and he did.

name: George, Fredrick Kellogg
description: His hobby: Afternoon naps and all night tete-a-tetes. Dislikes shop on sunny afternoons.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Skidmore."
His hobby: Afternoon naps and all night tete-a-tetes. Dislikes shop on sunny afternoons.

name: Mann, Horace Tharp
description: Coefficient of absorption undetermined. The profession lacks data.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Coefficient of absorption undetermined. The profession lacks data.

name: Mix, Ward Barr
description: Married and glad of it. Insists on outgrowing his clothes in every direction. Coefficient of expansion undetermined, the necessary data being lacking.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Married and glad of it. Insists on outgrowing his clothes in every direction. Coefficient of expansion undetermined, the necessary data being lacking.

name: Mook, Robert Lee
description: Whereabouts can generally be determined by "Pete," the setter, that hangs around outside waiting for him.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Whereabouts can generally be determined by "Pete," the setter, that hangs around outside waiting for him.

name: Murray, Edwin Phelps
description: Completely reformed. Learned from Dr. McRae how to prevent sparking, but never applied his knowledge.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Completely reformed. Learned from Dr. McRae how to prevent sparking, but never applied his knowledge.

name: Neer, Don Morgan
description: Lives in Kansas.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Nuff Said."
Lives in Kansas.

name: Nye, Alfred Leo
description: Is slowly, but surely, getting bald. Delivered groceries in Bisbee. Thinks now he could deliver the goods—in mining.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Bisbee Bill."
Is slowly, but surely, getting bald. Delivered groceries in Bisbee. Thinks now he could deliver the goods—in mining.

name: Radovich, John Christopher
description: Dealer in mining stock and talking machines. Trying to invent himself an electrically perfected voice.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Dealer in mining stock and talking machines. Trying to invent himself an electrically perfected voice.

name: Sandford, John Joseph
description: Loves Winter.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Loves Winter.

name: Sedivy, Miles
description: Has dreams of royal ladies and palaces.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Has dreams of royal ladies and palaces.

name: Thornhill, Edwin Bryant
description: Serious rival of Boyer. Has a contagious laugh.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Serious rival of Boyer. Has a contagious laugh.

name: Walker, Leland Ross
description: Mild, sweet temper. Noted fusser.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Mild, sweet temper. Noted fusser.

name: Wishon, A. Emory
description: A congestion of ideas. Those well acquainted with him say that he speaks English.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A congestion of ideas. Those well acquainted with him say that he speaks English.

name: Allen, R. S. Bobby
motto: "Sir, though I am not splenetic and rash, yet I have in me something dangerous."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Sir, though I am not splenetic and rash, yet I have in me something dangerous."

name: Blake, F. O. Jr.
motto: "A combination and a form indeed, where every God did seem to set his seal to give assurance to the man."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "A combination and a form indeed, where every God did seem to set his seal to give assurance to the man."

name: Blaylock, D. W.
motto: "Commerce follows in his wake." "Neither a borrower nor a lender be."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Commerce follows in his wake." "Neither a borrower nor a lender be."

name: Bunten, Scotch
description: Great Engineer in the chrysalis.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Rara Avis."
Great Engineer in the chrysalis.

name: Burdick, Charles A.
description: A lover of sport. Buys stamps in his spare time.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A lover of sport. Buys stamps in his spare time.

name: Clark, Jack
motto: "Give me an ounce of sen-sen, good apothecary, to sweeten my imagination."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Give me an ounce of sen-sen, good apothecary, to sweeten my imagination."

name: Connelly, Harry W.
description: All smiles although he has many social duties to worry him.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: All smiles although he has many social duties to worry him.

name: Coon, Nig
motto: "A countenance more in sorrow than in anger."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "A countenance more in sorrow than in anger."

name: Detweiler, A. M. and M. H.
description: Damon and Pythias. Brothers of widely different tastes.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Damon and Pythias. Brothers of widely different tastes.

name: Diaz, Chili
description: Dreams in Castellano. Tried to introduce Esperanto in the Trig class.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Dreams in Castellano. Tried to introduce Esperanto in the Trig class.

name: Dye, Bob
description: A victim of anarchy. Sympathizes with the nobility.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A victim of anarchy. Sympathizes with the nobility.

name: Dykes, Guy
clubs: The Man they Always Strike First for Class Dues
description: Said to have an awful thirst—for ice cream sodas.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Said to have an awful thirst—for ice cream sodas.

name: Frazer, Keith
description: Used index card system in Surveying notes.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Used index card system in Surveying notes.

name: Forman, Jake
description: Haunts Salem road.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Haunts Salem road.

name: Monroe, Farrar
description: Thinks Boyer is a great personage. Well, what an original idea!
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Thinks Boyer is a great personage. Well, what an original idea!

name: Gray, Cupid
description: From Ohio, but made good. Claims Buck Owen was the laziest man in Topog party. (Must be some mistake.)
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: From Ohio, but made good. Claims Buck Owen was the laziest man in Topog party. (Must be some mistake.)

name: Garza, Antonio
description: Once played football, but swore off before the end of the season.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Once played football, but swore off before the end of the season.

name: Gregory, Clay
motto: "Let a fellow sing of the little things he cares about, If a fellow'll fight for the little things he cares about, With the weight of a single blow."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Let a fellow sing of the little things he cares about, If a fellow'll fight for the little things he cares about, With the weight of a single blow."

name: Harris, Harry
motto: "Many grains of incense on the same altar. One falls first, another falls after; but it makes no difference."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Many grains of incense on the same altar. One falls first, another falls after; but it makes no difference."

name: Harrison, Cocky Wise
description: If you want to know anything, ask Cocky.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: If you want to know anything, ask Cocky.

name: Hill, F. W.
description: Stem winder, full jeweled, hair trigger, brass lined.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Stem winder, full jeweled, hair trigger, brass lined.

name: Insley, Earl
description: Has a chronic air of "Oh the deuce, what's the use."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Has a chronic air of "Oh the deuce, what's the use."

name: Jobes, The
description: A graceful man with an airy way. Intimate friend of Taft.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A graceful man with an airy way. Intimate friend of Taft.

name: Karte, Bauchschmartzen
description: A small boy, with an intellectual forehead, doing missionary work among the Grubstakers.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A small boy, with an intellectual forehead, doing missionary work among the Grubstakers.

name: List, Elmer
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Am I my brother's keeper?"

name: McNutt, V. H.
description: Looks like a student, but has the Spring recreation habit.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Looks like a student, but has the Spring recreation habit.

name: Miller, C. R.
description: We refer you to Vogt for information.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: We refer you to Vogt for information.

name: Minor, H. E.
description: Maverick with wonderful powers of keeping still.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Maverick with wonderful powers of keeping still.

name: Morgan, Rube
description: Born and raised in Rolla. Claims he can milk a cow even with a dress suit on. Bowls with Prof. Dean.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Born and raised in Rolla. Claims he can milk a cow even with a dress suit on. Bowls with Prof. Dean.

name: Owen, Buck
description: Innocent expression. Billiard "Shark." Lazy as an angora cat with the malaria.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Innocent expression. Billiard "Shark." Lazy as an angora cat with the malaria.

name: Park, Albert
motto: "Virtue rewards the toils of virtue." That's all.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Virtue rewards the toils of virtue." That's all.

name: Porri, L. J.
description: Aspires to Gotty's job.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Blow, blow, blow."
Aspires to Gotty's job.

name: Pierce, Cully
description: Everybody's friend. Wonderful sense of humor, smiles even in surveying.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Everybody's friend. Wonderful sense of humor, smiles even in surveying.

name: Porth, Babe
description: Regrets that he broke into society so young.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Great plague to be so handsome."
Regrets that he broke into society so young.

name: Phillips, Doctor
description: Insufferable rough neck and prides himself on the same. Never idle—never goes fussing.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Insufferable rough neck and prides himself on the same. Never idle—never goes fussing.

name: Ramey, Cary
description: Claims to be an expert chicken thief.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"And thereby hangs a tale."
Claims to be an expert chicken thief.

name: Riede, Dutch
description: Can play "Meditation" on the piano. Always occurs in combination with Bunten and Minor.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Can play "Meditation" on the piano. Always occurs in combination with Bunten and Minor.

name: Schmidt, S. K.
description: Believes in the forward pass.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Believes in the forward pass.

name: Smith, Earl
description: Van's brother from Boston Tech. That's all.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Van's brother from Boston Tech. That's all.

name: Smith, Gladys
description: Lowney's Chocolate fiend. Offers reward for return of powder puff.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Lowney's Chocolate fiend. Offers reward for return of powder puff.

name: Smith, Van
description: Looks like he always had a nervous headache. Said to have smiled once. "Swamp angel" from Arkansas.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Looks like he always had a nervous headache. Said to have smiled once. "Swamp angel" from Arkansas.

name: Smith, Duncan
description: Quick, jerky stride. Awfully good at convincing Profs. Smiles even during exam week.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Quick, jerky stride. Awfully good at convincing Profs. Smiles even during exam week.

name: Stewart, Stew
description: Never happy away from Qualitative lab. Insists on coming to M. S. M. dances as a "stag."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Never happy away from Qualitative lab. Insists on coming to M. S. M. dances as a "stag."

name: Thorny
description: Married happily, but still one of the boys. Still has a charivari coming to him.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Married happily, but still one of the boys. Still has a charivari coming to him.

name: Traughber
description: Wants to be a "kidder." Just found out that Connelly is ticklish.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Wants to be a "kidder." Just found out that Connelly is ticklish.

name: Townsend, Dick
description: Said to be a great musician, picking on a chicken bone.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Said to be a great musician, picking on a chicken bone.

name: Vogt, George
description: Distinguished from all the other Sophs by his broad brim hat.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Distinguished from all the other Sophs by his broad brim hat.

name: Vogt, Rhino
description: Sleepy look. Adamantine lustre on nose. Basial sitting posture.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"The smile that won't come off."
Sleepy look. Adamantine lustre on nose. Basial sitting posture.

name: Valencia, Carlos Jr.
description: Can be as festive as an American at times.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Can be as festive as an American at times.

name: Clyde Rex Wood
description: Geologist of note. His only worry is third term Spanish. His only hobby, twelve lovey-dovey letters a week.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Geologist of note. His only worry is third term Spanish. His only hobby, twelve lovey-dovey letters a week.
